title: task
description: python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/serial.py:109-114 - TOCTOU race in _read() closure. Between checking 'if self._serial is None' and accessing 'self._serial.in_waiting', the main thread running close() can set self._serial = None. The executor thread could then get AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'in_waiting'. Failure scenario: recv() called, close() called concurrently, _read runs after _serial set to None.
